rationale: Top-level review summary only; the referenced timeout and instruction handoff comments are tracked and addressed individually.
Updated the Temporal start-to-close and schedule-to-close examples to 28800 and 32400 seconds, and aligned runner timeouts and provider leases with the 480-minute maximum.

Added an instruction-file path allowlist entry for the safe profile so the activity can pass the materialized instruction bundle into the container without exposing instruction content in an environment value.
Added the same instruction-file path allowlist entry for the VPN lab profile.

Changed the command construction example from --instruction with inline content to --instruction-file with a workspace file path, and documented that instruction payloads must not be placed in argv, labels, or env values.
Automated review wrapper text with no additional actionable feedback beyond the inline comments.
